# UX Checklist: Schedule open-data refresh jobs

**Purpose**: Validate maintainer UI for refresh runs, summaries, and failures.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/022-schedule-refresh-jobs/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Run Visibility

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Run list shows status, trigger type, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Per-step status shows dataset versions and retry counts.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Final summary lists promoted, skipped, and failed datasets with reasons.

## Failure & Warnings

- [x] CHK-UX-004 UI shows actionable failure details for QA, promotion, missing secrets, or time-window overruns.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 UI clarifies production data remains unchanged for failed datasets.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-006 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Refresh run", "Step status", "Promotion", "Summary").
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
